title: feat: add Seedream 5.0 Lite as seedream5, keep legacy models hidden
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Dreaming in High Definition
gist.blurb: Seedream 5.0 Lite has arrived in the garden. It's faster, sharper, and ready to turn your prompts into pixel-perfect reality.
gist.summary: Added support for the Seedream 5.0 Lite model (`seedream5`) while preserving legacy access to version 4.0 and 4.5.
gist.impact: Users can now generate images with the latest Seedream 5.0 engine by specifying `model: 'seedream5'` in their requests.
gist.visual_concept: The concept of 'Seedream' translates literally to a magical garden. We visualize the upgrade to 5.0 as a new, more vibrant species of plant being introduced to the ecosystem.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the bee mascot planting a glowing magical seed labeled '5.0' in a garden bed. The seed is sprouting into a vibrant, holographic dream cloud. Lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'SEEDREAM 5'. Nostalgic but beautiful.
